hypothesis: The return from the late cash session to the next cash open can contain a persistent overnight premium distinct from intraday incumbent returns.

data.timestamp_basis: Darwinex broker-wall converted to UTC and exchange-local session time

causal_contract.entry: Open of a fixed M15 bar 1, 4, or 8 bars before the cash-session end.
causal_contract.exit: Open of the next available cash session plus 0, 2, or 4 M15 bars.
causal_contract.weekend: Friday entries are forbidden; the next session must be within four calendar days.
causal_contract.risk: Stop distance uses ATR56 known before entry; stop is resolved before target on ambiguous bars.
causal_contract.cost: Existing conservative round-trip price cost plus current direction-specific FTMO overnight swap; Wednesday rollover is tripled.

selection_contract.winner_score: maximum of min(development PF, validation PF), then trade count
selection_contract.holdout_open_rule: Open 2024-2025 only for the single global winner if every preholdout gate passes.
selection_contract.holdout_pass_rule: At least 80 trades, PF >= 1.10, positive pooled net R, and positive 2024 and 2025 net R.

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
